It "combined age + size policies work together" {
        $artifacts = Get-TestArtifacts
        # Age removes the >30-day artifacts, then size trims further
        $policy = New-RetentionPolicy -MaxAgeDays 30 -MaxTotalSizeMB 800 -KeepLatestN 1
        $plan = Get-DeletionPlan -Artifacts $artifacts -Policy $policy -ReferenceDate $now

        # Age deletes: 40-day test-results (45MB), 90-day coverage (180MB)
        # After age: retained = 500+480+50+200 = 1230 MB, over 800 budget
        # Size trims: unprotected oldest first — 480MB (3-day build, unprotected)
        # After size: retained = 500+50+200 = 750 ≤ 800
        $retainedSize = ($plan.ToRetain | Measure-Object -Property SizeMB -Sum).Sum
        $retainedSize | Should -BeLessOrEqual 800
        $plan.ToDelete.Count | Should -BeGreaterOrEqual 3
    }
}

1	# ArtifactCleanup.ps1
2	# Applies retention policies to CI/CD artifacts and generates deletion plans.
3	# Supports: max age, max total size, keep-latest-N per workflow, and dry-run mode.
4	
5	function New-RetentionPolicy {
6	    <#
7	    .SYNOPSIS
8	        Creates a retention policy object that governs which artifacts to keep or delete.
9	    .PARAMETER MaxAgeDays
10	        Artifacts older than this many days are candidates for deletion. Default: 30.
11	    .PARAMETER MaxTotalSizeMB
12	        If total artifact size exceeds this, oldest artifacts are deleted until under budget.
13	    .PARAMETER KeepLatestN
14	        Always keep at least the N most recent artifacts per workflow run ID. Default: 1.
15	    #>
16	    [CmdletBinding()]
17	    param(
18	        [int]$MaxAgeDays = 30,
19	        [object]$MaxTotalSizeMB = $null,
20	        [int]$KeepLatestN = 1
21	    )
22	
23	    if ($MaxAgeDays -lt 0) {
24	        throw "MaxAgeDays must be a positive integer. Got: $MaxAgeDays"
25	    }
26	    if ($KeepLatestN -lt 0) {
27	        throw "KeepLatestN must be a non-negative integer. Got: $KeepLatestN"
28	    }
29	    if ($null -ne $MaxTotalSizeMB -and $MaxTotalSizeMB -lt 0) {
30	        throw "MaxTotalSizeMB must be a positive number. Got: $MaxTotalSizeMB"
31	    }
32	
33	    [PSCustomObject]@{
34	        MaxAgeDays     = $MaxAgeDays
35	        MaxTotalSizeMB = $MaxTotalSizeMB
36	        KeepLatestN    = $KeepLatestN
37	    }
38	}
39	
40	function Get-DeletionPlan {
41	    <#
42	    .SYNOPSIS
43	        Evaluates artifacts against a retention policy and produces a deletion plan.
44	
45	    .DESCRIPTION
46	        Policy evaluation order:
47	          1. KeepLatestN — for each WorkflowRunId, the N newest artifacts are protected.
48	          2. MaxAge      — among unprotected artifacts, any older than MaxAgeDays is marked for deletion.
49	          3. MaxTotalSize — if remaining retained set exceeds MaxTotalSizeMB, the oldest
50	                           unprotected artifacts are trimmed until under budget.
51	
52	        KeepLatestN is always enforced, even if it means exceeding the size budget.
53	
54	    .PARAMETER Artifacts
55	        Array of artifact objects with Name, SizeMB, CreatedDate, WorkflowRunId properties.
56	    .PARAMETER Policy
57	        A retention policy object from New-RetentionPolicy.
58	    .PARAMETER ReferenceDate
59	        The "now" timestamp used for age calculations. Defaults to current time.
60	    #>
61	    [CmdletBinding()]
62	    param(
63	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
64	        [AllowEmptyCollection()]
65	        [object[]]$Artifacts,
66	
67	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
68	        [object]$Policy,
69	
70	        [datetime]$ReferenceDate = (Get-Date)
71	    )
72	
73	    if ($null -eq $Artifacts -or $Artifacts.Count -eq 0) {
74	        return [PSCustomObject]@{
75	            ToRetain = @()
76	            ToDelete = @()
77	            Summary  = [PSCustomObject]@{
78	                RetainedCount    = 0
79	                DeletedCount     = 0
80	                SpaceReclaimedMB = 0
81	                RetainedSizeMB   = 0
82	            }
83	        }
84	    }
85	
86	    # Step 1: Identify protected artifacts (KeepLatestN per workflow).
87	    # Group by WorkflowRunId, sort each group newest-first, protect the top N.
88	    $protected = @{}  # key = artifact identity string, value = $true
89	    $groups = $Artifacts | Group-Object -Property WorkflowRunId
90	    foreach ($group in $groups) {
91	        $sorted = $group.Group | Sort-Object -Property CreatedDate -Descending
92	        $keepCount = [Math]::Min($Policy.KeepLatestN, $sorted.Count)
93	        for ($i = 0; $i -lt $keepCount; $i++) {
94	            $key = "$($sorted[$i].WorkflowRunId)|$($sorted[$i].Name)|$($sorted[$i].CreatedDate.Ticks)|$($sorted[$i].SizeMB)"
95	            $protected[$key] = $true
96	        }
97	    }
98	
99	    # Helper to get an artifact's identity key
100	    $getKey = {
101	        param($a)
102	        "$($a.WorkflowRunId)|$($a.Name)|$($a.CreatedDate.Ticks)|$($a.SizeMB)"
103	    }
104	
105	    # Step 2: Apply MaxAge — mark unprotected artifacts older than MaxAgeDays for deletion.
106	    $toDelete = [System.Collections.Generic.List[object]]::new()
107	    $toRetain = [System.Collections.Generic.List[object]]::new()
108	
109	    foreach ($artifact in $Artifacts) {
110	        $key = & $getKey $artifact
111	        $ageDays = ($ReferenceDate - $artifact.CreatedDate).TotalDays
112	
113	        if ($protected.ContainsKey($key)) {
114	            # Protected by KeepLatestN — always retained
115	            $toRetain.Add($artifact)
116	        }
117	        elseif ($ageDays -gt $Policy.MaxAgeDays) {
118	            # Too old and unprotected — delete
119	            $toDelete.Add($artifact)
120	        }
121	        else {
122	            # Within age limit — tentatively retain (may be trimmed by size policy)
123	            $toRetain.Add($artifact)
124	        }
125	    }
126	
127	    # Step 3: Apply MaxTotalSize — if retained set exceeds budget, trim oldest unprotected.
128	    if ($null -ne $Policy.MaxTotalSizeMB) {
129	        $currentSize = ($toRetain | Measure-Object -Property SizeMB -Sum).Sum
130	        if ($currentSize -gt $Policy.MaxTotalSizeMB) {
131	            # Sort retained artifacts: unprotected first (candidates), then by age descending (oldest first)
132	            $retainedWithMeta = $toRetain | ForEach-Object {
133	                [PSCustomObject]@{
134	                    Artifact    = $_
135	                    IsProtected = $protected.ContainsKey((& $getKey $_))
136	                    AgeDays     = ($ReferenceDate - $_.CreatedDate).TotalDays
137	                }
138	            }
139	            # Candidates for trimming: unprotected, sorted oldest-first
140	            $candidates = $retainedWithMeta |
141	                Where-Object { -not $_.IsProtected } |
142	                Sort-Object -Property AgeDays -Descending
143	
144	            foreach ($candidate in $candidates) {
145	                if ($currentSize -le $Policy.MaxTotalSizeMB) { break }
146	                $currentSize -= $candidate.Artifact.SizeMB
147	                $toDelete.Add($candidate.Artifact)
148	                $toRetain.Remove($candidate.Artifact) | Out-Null
149	            }
150	        }
151	    }
152	
153	    # Build summary
154	    $deletedSize  = if ($toDelete.Count -gt 0) { ($toDelete | Measure-Object -Property SizeMB -Sum).Sum } else { 0 }
155	    $retainedSize = if ($toRetain.Count -gt 0) { ($toRetain | Measure-Object -Property SizeMB -Sum).Sum } else { 0 }
156	
157	    [PSCustomObject]@{
158	        ToRetain = @($toRetain)
159	        ToDelete = @($toDelete)
160	        Summary  = [PSCustomObject]@{
161	            RetainedCount    = $toRetain.Count
162	            DeletedCount     = $toDelete.Count
163	            SpaceReclaimedMB = $deletedSize
164	            RetainedSizeMB   = $retainedSize
165	        }
166	    }
167	}
168	
169	function Invoke-ArtifactCleanup {
170	    <#
171	    .SYNOPSIS
172	        Orchestrates artifact cleanup: builds a deletion plan and optionally executes it.
173	
174	    .DESCRIPTION
175	        In dry-run mode (default), only produces the plan and report without deleting anything.
176	        When DryRun is $false, calls DeleteAction for each artifact marked for deletion.
177	
178	    .PARAMETER DeleteAction
179	        A scriptblock called with each artifact to delete. Allows callers to plug in
180	        their own deletion logic (e.g., API calls, file removal).
181	    #>
182	    [CmdletBinding()]
183	    param(
184	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
185	        [AllowEmptyCollection()]
186	        [object[]]$Artifacts,
187	
188	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
189	        [object]$Policy,
190	
191	        [switch]$DryRun,
192	
193	        [scriptblock]$DeleteAction = $null,
194	
195	        [datetime]$ReferenceDate = (Get-Date)
196	    )
197	
198	    $plan = Get-DeletionPlan -Artifacts $Artifacts -Policy $Policy -ReferenceDate $ReferenceDate
199	
200	    $deletedArtifacts = @()
201	
202	    if (-not $DryRun -and $plan.ToDelete.Count -gt 0) {
203	        $deletedList = [System.Collections.Generic.List[object]]::new()
204	        foreach ($artifact in $plan.ToDelete) {
205	            try {
206	                if ($null -ne $DeleteAction) {
207	                    & $DeleteAction $artifact
208	                }
209	                $deletedList.Add($artifact)
210	            }
211	            catch {
212	                Write-Error "Failed to delete artifact '$($artifact.Name)' (workflow $($artifact.WorkflowRunId)): $_"
213	            }
214	        }
215	        $deletedArtifacts = @($deletedList)
216	    }
217	
218	    [PSCustomObject]@{
219	        DryRun           = [bool]$DryRun
220	        Plan             = $plan
221	        DeletedArtifacts = $deletedArtifacts
222	    }
223	}
224	
225	function Format-DeletionReport {
226	    <#
227	    .SYNOPSIS
228	        Formats a deletion plan into a human-readable report string.
229	    #>
230	    [CmdletBinding()]
231	    param(
232	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
233	        [object]$Plan,
234	
235	        [switch]$DryRun
236	    )
237	
238	    $sb = [System.Text.StringBuilder]::new()
239	
240	    if ($DryRun) {
241	        [void]$sb.AppendLine("=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP REPORT (DRY RUN) ===")
242	    }
243	    else {
244	        [void]$sb.AppendLine("=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP REPORT ===")
245	    }
246	    [void]$sb.AppendLine()
247	
248	    # Deletion list
249	    if ($Plan.ToDelete.Count -gt 0) {
250	        [void]$sb.AppendLine("--- TO DELETE ($($Plan.ToDelete.Count) artifacts) ---")
251	        foreach ($a in $Plan.ToDelete) {
252	            [void]$sb.AppendLine("  DELETE  $($a.Name)  | $($a.SizeMB) MB | Workflow $($a.WorkflowRunId) | Created $($a.CreatedDate.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd'))")
253	        }
254	    }
255	    else {
256	        [void]$sb.AppendLine("--- No artifacts to delete ---")
257	    }
258	    [void]$sb.AppendLine()
259	
260	    # Retention list
261	    if ($Plan.ToRetain.Count -gt 0) {
262	        [void]$sb.AppendLine("--- TO RETAIN ($($Plan.ToRetain.Count) artifacts) ---")
263	        foreach ($a in $Plan.ToRetain) {
264	            [void]$sb.AppendLine("  RETAIN  $($a.Name)  | $($a.SizeMB) MB | Workflow $($a.WorkflowRunId) | Created $($a.CreatedDate.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd'))")
265	        }
266	    }
267	    [void]$sb.AppendLine()
268	
269	    # Summary
270	    [void]$sb.AppendLine("--- SUMMARY ---")
271	    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  Artifacts retained:   $($Plan.Summary.RetainedCount)")
272	    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  Artifacts deleted:    $($Plan.Summary.DeletedCount)")
273	    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  Space reclaimed:      $($Plan.Summary.SpaceReclaimedMB) MB")
274	    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  Space retained:       $($Plan.Summary.RetainedSizeMB) MB")
275	
276	    $sb.ToString()
277	}

5. Dry-run mode (2 tests)
6. Report formatting (2 tests)
7. Edge cases — empty list, single artifact, KeepLatestN=0, all fresh, combined policies (5 tests)
8. Error handling — partial failure resilience (1 test)
